name: Opal Deneke's Fig Jam
recipeInstructions:
NOTE #1: Weigh figs after peeling, removing only the peeling that easily pulls off with the stem.
1. Mash peeled figs to fine pulp.
2. Add crushed pineapple and other ingredients (sugar, lemon juice, cinnamon, cloves, allspice).
3. Mix thoroughly until combined.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
5. Pour into hot sterile jars and seal.
